testcase.name: Sematic application renders the pipeline index page

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `[data-cy=pipeline-row]`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `[data-cy=pipeline-row]`, but never found it. at Context.eval (webpack:///./support/commands.ts:30:17)
